title: Charter's internet growth struggles, but analyst sees an ‘Act III' on the horizon
text: Charter Communications Inc. posted a net loss of internet subscribers for its latest quarter, offering one more sign of the tough conditions cable companies face when it comes to expanding their broadband customer bases after a stretch of pandemic-fueled growth.

title: Charter Communications Inc. (CHTR) CEO Tom Rutledge on Q2 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Charter Communications Inc (NASDAQ:CHTR ) Q2 2022 Earnings Conference Call July 29, 2022 8:30 AM ET Company Participants Stefan Anninger - Head of IR Tom Rutledge - Chairman and CEO Jessica Fischer - CFO Chris Winfrey - COO Conference Call Participants Ben Swinburne - Morgan Stanley Vijay Jayant - Evercore Craig Moffett - MoffettNathanson Doug Mitchelson - Credit Suisse Jonathan Chaplin - New Street Bryan Kraft - Deutsche Bank Phil Cusick - JPMorgan Peter Supino - Wolf Research Kutgun Maral - RBC Capital Markets Operator Hello, and welcome to the Charter Communications Second Quarter 2022 Investor Call. We ask that you please hold your questions until the completion of the formal remarks, at which time you will be given instruction for the question and answer session.

title: Charter Q2 Results Echo Comcast's, Beating Wall Street Expectations But Showing Rare Loss Of Broadband Subscribers
text: Charter Communications followed Comcast's uneven financial report on Thursday with its own mixed batch of results, which featured an unusual decline in broadband subscribers but also key metrics above Wall Street expectations. Revenue increased 6% to $13.6 billion, edging Wall Street analysts' consensus forecast of $13.4 billion. Earnings per share of $8.

title: Charter Communications (CHTR) Tops Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Charter (CHTR) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 27.17% and 1.31%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Charter earnings top expectations but company shows loss of internet subscribers
text: Charter Communications Inc. CHTR, -8.48% topped expectations with its latest revenue and income figures Friday but disclosed that it lost internet subscribers in the second quarter. Charter posted net income of $1.47 billion, of $8.96 a share, up from $1.02 billion, or $5.48 a share, in the year-prior quarter.

title: Charter Announces Second Quarter 2022 Results
text: STAMFORD, Conn. , July 29, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Charter Communications, Inc. (along with its subsidiaries, the "Company" or "Charter") today reported financial and operating results for the three and six months ended June 30, 2022.

title: 4 Media Stocks Set to Beat Estimates This Earnings Season
text: Here we pick four media companies - PARA, RCI, WBD and CHTR - that are likely to pull off a beat this earnings season.

title: Charter Communications And Its Real Value
text: Charter Communications has provided impressive returns to investors, easily outpacing the S&P 500. The company appears to be undervalued, especially when considering analysts expect continued double-digit growth in share price.

title: Charter Communications: Heads We Win, Tails We Don't Lose
text: Charter is a perfect business for an inflationary environment: Internet is a necessity, and Charter has pricing power. If it raises prices, it will not lose customers. A large chunk of its costs are fixed and thus will not rise with inflation. Over the last five years, the company bought almost half of its shares, and it will keep doing it. Charter is not shy about using debt, and it shouldn't be - after all, it has very stable, highly recurring revenues and cash flows.

title: Charter's Valuation Is Compelling But Growth May Be At Risk
text: Charter has managed to offset declining video and voice subscriptions with consistent internet growth. I'm also interested by growth opportunities in the mobile space.

title: Why Charter (CHTR) Could Beat Earnings Estimates Again
text: Charter (CHTR) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

title: 2 Potential Berkshire Acquisitions
text: Something I have been thinking about recently is the possibility of Berkshire Hathaway ( BRK.A , Financial) ( BRK.B , Financial) and Warren Buffett (Trades, Portfolio) making an offer for a company that has seen its share price decline significantly over the past couple of months.
